data.title: 'AI Is Eating Search' Google Rival Perplexity CEO Arvind Srinivas Says As Dan Nile Predicts 'Agents' To Take Future Share Amid Alphabet, Apple Stock Fall
data.description: Market giants Alphabet Inc. and Apple Inc. saw their stocks tumble Wednesday after reports suggested Apple may be reconsidering its lucrative search partnership with Google, with artificial intelligence emerging as the catalyst for potential industry disruption.

data.title: Ford Hikes Prices Of Select Mexico-Produced Vehicles Amid Auto Tariff Uncertainty: Report
data.description: Ford will raise prices of some vehicles produced in Mexico by up to $2,000, citing usual mid-year pricing actions.

data.title: Trump Teases 'Very, Very Big Announcement' As US, UK Close To Finalizing Trade Deal: Report
data.description: The U.S. and U.K. are reportedly close to finalizing a trade agreement. This would be the first such pact since the U.S. implemented stringent reciprocal tariffs in April.

data.title: House GOP Representatives Want To Axe Federal EV Credit Amid Trump's Tax Cuts: Report
data.description: The GOP may end the federal EV credit program to implement Trump's tax cuts. This could impact companies like Tesla, GM, and Ford.

data.title: US Foods, ConocoPhillips And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Thursday
